channel.title: JLPT Masterclass Library Updates | YUI & YUTO
channel.description: Latest updates from the ultimate JLPT learning platform for Thai speakers.

item.title: Major Site Upgrade: JLPT Masterclass Library is Live!
item.description: We have completely refactored our JLPT N1-N5 vocabulary and listening practice modules to premium Masterclass standards. Optimized for AdSense and E-E-A-T compliance.
